summary: Iteration 12 testing completed - P0 Background Agent Job Queue System. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Agent Console panel verified with Jobs, Autonomy, and Analytics tabs working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in list_jobs endpoint by adding sanitize_mongo_doc helper function
All job management endpoints working correctly (create, start, pause, cancel)
Autonomy preferences properly stored and retrieved per user
Job analytics correctly aggregates job statistics
seed_data_creation: Test jobs created with TEST_ prefix during testing (research, outreach, follow_up, data_enrich, custom job types)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Background Agent Job Queue System fully implemented and tested. All job management endpoints working. Agent Console panel in AICommandCenter.tsx has three tabs: Jobs (shows running/recent jobs with status), Autonomy (configurable per task type with dropdowns), Analytics (job statistics with counts by status and type). Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in autonomous_jobs.py.

backend_create_job.details: Creates jobs for all types: research, outreach, follow_up, data_enrich, custom. Supports autoStart and scheduledTime options.

backend_list_jobs.details: Lists user's jobs with optional status and job_type filters. Fixed ObjectId serialization issue.

backend_autonomy_preferences.details: Get and update autonomy preferences per task type

backend_job_analytics.details: Returns total, byStatus, byType, and successRate

backend_quick_start.details: Quick start actions for common job types

frontend_agent_console.details: Panel visible on right side with Jobs, Autonomy, Analytics tabs

frontend_jobs_tab.details: Shows running jobs with progress, recent jobs with status indicators, Quick Start buttons

frontend_autonomy_tab.details: Default Level dropdown, Per Task Type settings (Research, Outreach, Follow Up, Lead Monitor, Data Enrich), Notifications checkboxes

frontend_analytics_tab.details: Shows Total Jobs, Running, Completed, Success Rate, Jobs by Type breakdown

mocked_apis.agent_task_execution: Agent tasks (research, outreach, etc.) use simulated execution - no real external API calls
mocked_apis.sendgrid: SendGrid email sending is MOCKED - placeholder API key in backend/.env
mocked_apis.data_sources: Apollo.io, Clearbit, Crunchbase integrations are UI placeholders only

mongodb_objectid_serialization.issue: list_jobs endpoint returning 500 error due to MongoDB ObjectId not being JSON serializable
mongodb_objectid_serialization.fix: Added sanitize_mongo_doc helper function to recursively remove _id fields from nested documents

test_execution_details.playwright_tests: All UI elements verified - Agent Console with Jobs/Autonomy/Analytics tabs
